_meta_comment: Enrich policy referenced by the m_26_14-osquery-normalize ingest pipeline. Match is on package.name, so ANY collector that emits package.name (osquery, a customer CMDB/EDR feed, our netobserved-devices network monitor, or a combination) gets SWAM enrichment. Deploy order: (1) PUT index template m_26_14-authorized-software-catalog, (2) index catalog docs (see m_26_14-authorized-software-seed.ndjson for a starter set — replace with your agency's authorized software list), (3) PUT /_enrich/policy/m_26_14-authorized-software with the 'policy' body below, (4) POST /_enrich/policy/m_26_14-authorized-software/_execute. Re-execute the policy whenever the catalog changes.
